In this role, the Physical Therapist provides developmentally appropriate interventions to infants and toddlers ages 0–3 with physical, motor, or developmental needs who qualify for Early Start services under Part C of IDEA. The PT delivers therapy both in-person and remotely and may supervise Physical Therapist Assistants (PTAs) in the delivery of therapy services.\\n\\nWe offer competitive rates, drive time, mileage and toys reimbursement. <div id="cc-main" data-nosnippet=""><div class="cm-wrapper cc--anim"><div class="cm cm--box cm--bottom cm--right" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-hidden="true" aria-describedby="cm__desc" aria-labelledby="cm__title"><div tabindex="-1"></div><div class="cm__body"><div class="cm__texts"><h2 id="cm__title" class="cm__title">We use cookies</h2><p id="cm__desc" class="cm__desc">This website uses essential cookies to ensure its proper operation and tracking cookies to understand how you interact with it.
